title: Enable and Configure ModSecurity WAF
description: Enable ModSecurity with OWASP Core Rule Set to protect against SQLi, XSS, RCE, and common web attacks.

implementation.apache: a2enmod security2; set SecRuleEngine On; include /usr/share/modsecurity-crs/*.conf
implementation.nginx: Use ModSecurity-nginx connector or alternative WAF

verification: Test with SQLi payload: curl -s 'http://example.com/?id=1 OR 1=1' triggers 403

title: Configure Comprehensive Security Headers
description: Set X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, CSP, HSTS.

implementation.apache: Header always set X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN; Header always set X-Content-Type-Options nosniff; Header always set Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin; Header always set Strict-Transport-Security max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains
implementation.nginx: add_header X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN; add_header Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin

verification: curl -I https://example.com shows all security headers

title: Disable Directory Listing
description: Prevent Apache from showing directory contents when no index file exists.

implementation.apache: Options -Indexes in httpd.conf or .htaccess globally

verification: Access directory without index file returns 403 Forbidden

title: Hide Server Version and OS Tokens
description: Prevent Apache from advertising version and OS in error pages and Server header.

implementation.apache: ServerTokens Prod; ServerSignature Off; in httpd.conf or security.conf

verification: curl -I shows Server: Apache only, no version or OS info; error pages show generic text

title: Disable TRACE and TRACK Methods
description: TRACE/TRACK methods can be used for cross-site tracing (XST) and cookie theft attacks.

implementation.apache: TraceEnable Off; in httpd.conf or security.conf
implementation.nginx: Not applicable by default; if enabled via modules, disable

verification: curl -X TRACE returns 405 Method Not Allowed

title: Harden SSL/TLS Configuration
description: Enforce TLS 1.2+, disable weak ciphers, enable OCSP stapling, and perfect forward secrecy.

implementation.apache: SSLProtocol -all +TLSv1.2 +TLSv1.3; SSLCipherSuite HIGH:!aNULL:!MD5:!RC4; SSLHonorCipherOrder on; SSLSessionTickets Off
implementation.nginx: ssl_protocols TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3; ssl_ciphers HIGH:!aNULL:!MD5; ssl_prefer_server_ciphers on

verification: SSL Labs scan shows A+ rating with TLS 1.2+ and no weak ciphers

title: Disable ETags and Use Content Hash
description: ETags reveal inode numbers in default config. Disable them or configure FileETag none.

implementation.apache: FileETag None; or FileETag MTime Size; in httpd.conf

verification: curl -I shows no ETag header or ETag without inode info

title: Limit Request Body and Header Sizes
description: Prevent DoS via oversized requests. Limit body to sensible max based on app requirements.

implementation.apache: LimitRequestBody 10485760; LimitRequestFields 50; LimitRequestFieldSize 8190

verification: Uploading 20MB file returns 413 Request Entity Too Large

title: Reduce Timeout and KeepAlive Settings
description: Lower timeout values to free connections faster and reduce slowloris attack surface.

implementation.apache: Timeout 45; KeepAlive On; KeepAliveTimeout 5; MaxKeepAliveRequests 100

verification: Slowloris connections are terminated within 45 seconds

title: Enable Comprehensive Access and Error Logging
description: Log all access with detailed format including response time, user agent, and referer. Enable mod_unique_id.

implementation.apache: LogFormat combined with %T response time; mod_unique_id for request correlation
implementation.nginx: Configure detailed log format in nginx.conf

verification: Access logs contain request IDs and response time fields

title: Disable Unnecessary Modules (CGI, SSI, Dav)
description: Remove unused modules like mod_cgi, mod_include, mod_dav, mod_info, mod_status, mod_imagemap to reduce attack surface.

implementation.apache: a2dismod cgi include dav info status imagemap; systemctl restart apache2
implementation.nginx: Ensure only required modules are compiled; use minimal modules

verification: Disabled modules are not loaded; apache2ctl -M confirms

title: Disable Content Negotiation and MultiViews
description: MultiViews can expose source code and cause information disclosure attacks.

implementation.apache: Options -MultiViews in all directory blocks and virtual hosts
implementation.nginx: Not applicable; nginx does not support content negotiation

verification: Request file extension variations do not trigger content negotiation

title: Secure mod_rewrite Rules
description: Use RewriteCond with %{THE_REQUEST} to prevent direct access to scripts, block uploaded PHP execution.

implementation.apache: RewriteCond %{THE_REQUEST} \.php/.+ HTTP; RewriteRule .* - [F,L] for uploaded PHP protection

verification: Uploaded PHP file inside image directory returns 403

title: Disable FollowSymlinks if Not Needed
description: FollowSymLinks can allow directory traversal through symbolic links. Use SymLinksIfOwnerMatch instead.

implementation.apache: Options -FollowSymLinks +SymLinksIfOwnerMatch in Directory blocks
implementation.nginx: Not applicable; nginx resolves symlinks to real paths

verification: Symlink to system files returns 403 or 404

title: Run Apache in chroot or AppArmor Context
description: Restrict Apache process to web root using chroot or AppArmor to contain breaches.

implementation.apache: AppArmor profile: /etc/apparmor.d/usr.sbin.apache2; restrict to /var/www
implementation.nginx: AppArmor profile for nginx worker processes

verification: Apache process cannot read /etc/passwd or write outside /var/www

title: Use Valid TLS Certificates and Auto-Renewal
description: Deploy valid certificates from trusted CA. Automate renewal with certbot.

implementation.apache: certbot --apache -d example.com -d www.example.com; configure auto-renew cron

verification: SSL Labs test shows valid certificate chain, not expired, no warnings

title: Implement Strict CORS Configuration
description: Only allow CORS on specific endpoints needed; do not use wildcard origins.

implementation.apache: Header set Access-Control-Allow-Origin https://example.com; Header set Access-Control-Allow-Methods GET POST
implementation.linux: curl -H Origin:https://evil.com -I https://example.com/api returns no ACAO header

verification: Unauthorized origin requests CORS headers are absent

title: Configure Custom Error Pages
description: Replace default error pages with custom pages that do not reveal server version or stack traces.

implementation.apache: ErrorDocument 404 /errors/404.html; ErrorDocument 500 /errors/500.html

verification: Trigger 404 and 500; custom page shown with no version disclosure

title: Implement Rate Limiting for IPs
description: Install and configure mod_evasive or mod_qos to block abusive request patterns.

implementation.apache: apt install libapache2-mod-evasive; configure DOSPageCount=50; DOSSiteCount=100

verification: Abusive IP gets 403 or connection dropped after threshold

title: Restrict Sensitive Directories and Files
description: Block access to .git, .env, backup files, and config files that may contain credentials.

implementation.apache: <FilesMatch \.(git|env|bak|sql|config)$> Order allow,deny; Deny from all </FilesMatch>

verification: Access to .git/config, .env, or .sql files returns 403 Forbidden
